narrative:
Medina County has 131,093 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.5 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.7% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -4.2% D−R vs -18.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
